_comment: Hand-verified ground truth per quotation file. expectedTotal = FINAL grand total (after discount). Confirmed by Darren 2026-07-09.

111.pdf.note: document shows 198,275 pre-discount; has a discount line — 194,350 is final

Impian Office RV2.pdf.note: three SECTION totals (175,031 + 174,525 + 158,176 + misc) sum to grand total — repeated items across sections are legitimate, NOT revisions

Legoland Quotation.pdf.note: GRAND TOTAL before contingency & taxes. Doc also shows Contingency 10% (149,295.31) + SST 6% (89,577.19) = Net Contract Sum 1,731,825.60 — those belong in subtotals, NOT in totalAmount
